headline: How The CenterPoint Energy (CNP) Investment Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: CenterPoint Energy’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$46.13 to US$46.00, reflecting a small reset in what analysts see as a reasonable price target range. The shift lines up with recent Street research, where some firms raised targets and others cut them, as opinions differ on how much to pay for utility earnings and execution risk right now. Read on to see how those competing views are shaping the evolving story around CenterPoint Energy and what it could mean for your...
